items.title: Ordinary least squares baseline
items.description: Ridge and Lasso extend the linear regression loss ||y - Xβ||₂² with L2 or L1 penalties when OLS overfits or is unstable.

items.title: L1 and L2 norms
items.description: Ridge penalizes the L2 norm squared of β; Lasso penalizes the L1 norm. The geometry of these norms explains shrinkage versus sparsity.

items.title: Gaussian and Laplace priors (MAP)
items.description: Ridge is MAP under Gaussian priors on coefficients; Lasso is MAP under Laplace priors—the penalty terms are negative log-priors.

items.title: General L1/L2 regularization
items.description: This topic is the canonical linear-regression instantiation of L1 and L2 regularization; the overfitting-mitigation topic covers the broader regularization toolkit.
